summary: Tested FantaPronostic scoring refactor from decimal (0.5/1.0/4.0) to integer scoring (1/2/5). Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, navigation, standings verified. Admin UI shows new scoring values correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend scoring.py MARKET_POINTS has correct values: 1X2=2.0, GOAL_NOGOL=1.0, OVER_UNDER_25=1.0, EXACT_SCORE=5.0
VERIFIED: GET /api/leagues/{id} returns scoring_config with new values (1x2=2, over_under=1, goal_no_goal=1, exact_score=5)
VERIFIED: GET /api/standings/total shows integer point totals (41.0, 39.0, 18.0) - no 0.5 decimals
VERIFIED: GET /api/live/{matchday_id} returns live match data with PUNTI BASE and PUNTI PROVVISORI
VERIFIED: Admin UI /api/admin-ui Leghe list shows Regole column with '1X2:2 O/U:1 GG/NG:1 Esatto:5'
VERIFIED: Frontend login works with ilio@raimondi.it / password123
VERIFIED: Frontend Rankings tab shows integer point totals for users
VERIFIED: Frontend Predictions/Live tab shows X3 badge for special matches
VERIFIED: League switcher works - can switch between liga2 and Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic
NOTE: Rules screen (Regolamento) is accessible via hamburger menu but testing blocked by navigation timing
NOTE: X3 multiplier is configured and visible on match #8 (Genk vs SC Freiburg)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scoring refactor verified working. NEW values: 1X2=2pts, GG/NG=1pt, O/U=1pt, Exact=5pts. OLD values were 1X2=1, GG/NG=0.5, O/U=0.5, Exact=4. All standings show integer totals. Admin UI displays scoring as read-only text in Regole column. X3 multiplier visible on special matches. User ilio@raimondi.it has multiple leagues - default is liga2, can switch to 'Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic' for LIVE Giornata 25.

verified_features.frontend_login: PASS - Login with standard user works

verified_features.frontend_standings: PASS - Rankings tab shows integer point totals
verified_features.frontend_predictions: PASS - Live/Predictions screen shows matches with X3 badge
verified_features.admin_ui_leagues: PASS - Leghe list shows correct scoring in Regole column: 1X2:2 O/U:1 GG/NG:1 Esatto:5
